items.name_cn: New arrivals

specs.rawTitle: New arrivals

items.name_en: New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
items.name_cn:
New Chanel 25 Bag|||The rising "Chanel 25bag" is another "It Bag" following the Chanel 22bag! The design is classic and practical, continuing the brand's three signature elements: quilted lambskin, chain strap, and double-C turn-lock, but the drawstring design looks more casual![Selfie][Blow Kiss]
Carrying Styles & Comfort:
The chain strap is adjustable in length, supporting shoulder, crossbody, and hand-carry styles, suitable for commuting, dates, and casual occasions;
A separate leather lining enhances support, making it comfortable to carry for long periods.
Fits a phone, small wallet, and keys Light travel, evening wear
The Chanel 25 Bag has a "just right" golden size, balancing capacity, portability, and daily adaptability, widely regarded as the most handy choice.
Dimensions 30x26x14

items.name_cn:
New Release 🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Black
Purchased from the counter for 31,800 RMB~
Bestseller Reissue 🔥 New version Mini Kelly horizontal

this cross-chain handle Mini Kelly was born.
With a unique design, it has an elegant handbag feel,
and can be casually crossbody, unlocking diverse fashion looks~

items.name_cn:
New: Pre-owned model zp edition
Chan1 Large Crossbody Bag Retro chain decoration makes the whole bag unique, full of artistic atmosphere. The flap design highlights a casual style, not too restrictive, letting you show your most natural state anytime, anywhere. The quality is reliable, no need to worry about defects. Made of premium materials, ensuring durability and longevity. Internal details are also exquisite, effectively protecting your items, giving you peace of mind when going out. In summary, this exclusive vintage pre-owned shoulder bag is the perfect choice for casual elegance! It not only boosts your fashion index but also shows your personality and taste. Whether at any time or place, it makes you radiate charm and become the focus of attention. Get it now, let yourself exude charm every day.
Code: 3329
Size: 34cm

Tech material has a nice luster

Suitable for both petite and tall frames
